description_long: This is a weathered, industrial-style air conditioner unit with a rectangular metal body and a visibly rusted, mottled gray surface. The front face features a large, circular fan grille with concentric rings and radial spokes, set within a square recessed panel. The sides and back are mostly flat and unadorned, except for a small access panel on one side and some minor surface pitting and corrosion. The unit stands on two sturdy, bent metal legs, which are also rusted and show signs of age. The overall appearance suggests it is designed for outdoor use, likely mounted near the ground in an urban or industrial setting. There are no visible brand markings or control panels on the exterior.
description: A rusted, rectangular metal air conditioner unit with a large circular fan grille on the front and sturdy metal legs. The surface is mottled gray with heavy weathering and corrosion.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large circular fan grille set in a square panel, with rust and weathering clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a small rectangular access panel and the bent metal leg structure beneath the unit.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a flat, featureless metal surface with heavy corrosion and two supporting legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view is mostly flat and unadorned, showing the depth of the unit and the leg structure.
attribute_grille_pattern: Circular grille with concentric rings and radial spokes, evenly spaced, covering the fan opening.
attribute_exhaust_vent_design: Single large circular vent on the front, covered by a metal grille; no other visible exhaust vents.
